name: Hungry Jack Biscuit Bear Claws
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Grease a large cookie sheet.
3. In a small bowl, combine cream cheese, marmalade, and raisins; mix well.
4. Separate the dough into 20 biscuits.
5. Press or roll each biscuit into a 4-inch circle.
6. Spoon 1 tablespoon of cream cheese mixture onto the center of 10 of the biscuits. Top the remaining biscuits on top.
7. Use a fork to press and seal the edges.
8. Cut five 1/2-inch slits, about 1 inch apart, around one side of each biscuit to resemble bear claws.
9. In a small bowl, combine sliced almonds and sugar.
10. Dip the top of each biscuit into orange juice and sprinkle with almond mixture.
11. Place biscuits on the greased cookie sheet.
12. Bake at 375°F for 15 to 20 minutes or until golden brown.
13. Let cool for 1 minute, then remove from the cookie sheet.
14. Allow to cool for an additional 10 minutes before serving.
15. Store in refrigerator. Makes 10 bear claws.
